description_long: This is a tall, cylindrical stone obelisk with a square base and a decorative urn-shaped finial at the top. The main shaft is smooth and gray, with engraved inscriptions on one side, likely commemorative or memorial in nature. The base is square, slightly weathered, and appears to be made of the same stone as the shaft, with some moss or lichen growth visible along the edges. The urn at the top is ornate, featuring subtle carved details and a flared lip. The obelisk stands on a flat, stone platform that is flush with the ground, providing stability and a sense of permanence. The overall appearance is solemn and dignified, suitable for placement in a park, cemetery, or public square.
description: A tall, gray stone obelisk with a square base, engraved inscriptions, and an ornate urn-shaped finial on top. The structure is weathered and stands on a mossy stone platform.
description_view_0: Front view showing the engraved inscriptions and the full detail of the urn-shaped finial.
description_view_1: Side view revealing partial inscriptions and the cylindrical shaft, with the base's weathering more visible.
description_view_2: Rear view with no visible inscriptions, highlighting the smooth stone shaft and the square base.
description_view_3: Angled side view showing the continuation of the shaft and partial inscription, with moss on the base.
attribute_inscription: Engraved text is visible on the front face of the shaft, in a serif style and likely English, though the text is partially illegible due to weathering.
attribute_ornamentation: Ornate urn-shaped finial at the top with subtle carved details; no other decorative motifs or reliefs visible on the shaft or base.
attribute_base_design: The base is square, made of stone, and slightly raised with visible weathering and moss growth along the edges. It is simple and functional, providing stability.
attribute_tip_design: The tip features an urn-shaped finial with a flared lip and subtle carved ornamentation, giving a classical and dignified appearance.
